title: 走るだけがすべてではないのよ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Early one morning...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Trainer! I don't often see you at
this time of day.
choice_data_list: Were you doing some morning training?
Were you doing some morning training?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's right. The weather is so pleasant, I thought
it would be a waste not to go for a run.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the weather will be this good all day.
A perfect day for training!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I have to get ready for school now. I'll see
you later at practice!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I plan on running to my heart's content today, so
you best prepare a suitable plan for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But when training time comes around...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Why are you still in your uniform?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing. Anyway, do you think we could
train in the pool today?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
After all, it's important to do cross-training,
wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Alternatively, even a lecture would suffice.
Knowledge is also essential when it comes to
running, is it not?
choice_data_list:
Didn't you say today's weather is perfect for
running?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: W-well, I changed my mind!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course running is important. I know I grow
stronger with every lap I run.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But, you know, having a broad perspective can
really expand your potential!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You might find something you never would have
noticed while running—a whole new version of
yourself!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A true first-rate is never satisfied! They must
always strive to become better!
choice_data_list: Well, you do have a good point.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! But of course!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now then, whether it's swimming or studying, let's
do something other than running!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, but I can't go partner running with you.
We've just decided not to run today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I was wondering about that, actually. I
thought that maybe you could run in your school
uniform or something.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you told me this morning you accidentally
put all of your tracksuits in the wash at once
and—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey! There's no need to go into details!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! It's nothing! Don't mind her, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come on, don't just stand there! It's time for us to
discover my hidden potentials!
choice_data_list: Right, let's focus on training other skills!
Sounds like you made a little mistake.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I knew you were my trainer for a reason! Running
is something you can do anytime... Just not now!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... I can lend you a tracksuit if you want...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I'm doing this because I don't have a
tracksuit! Cross-training is also important, you
know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: King Halo insists on practicing other skills today.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
N-not at all! It's not like I put all my tracksuits in
the washing machine by mistake!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But fine! If you want to see me run that badly, just
wait while I get changed!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: There! Now I can run as much as you want!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I simply feel more motivated this way! Come on,
Special Week. It's time for partner running!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's because of the sunny weather or
something else, King Halo takes off at top speed.
